requestment_date.text: วันที่ยื่น

user_id.text: ผู้ทำรายการ

root.sql:
select sum(row_memno) over (partition by tab.requestment_date order by tab.loan_requestment_no ,tab.ref_contract_no ,tab.requestment_date ,tab.membership_no ,tab.entry_id ) as rowno , tab.* from ( SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as membername , decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,null,1)over(order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno, sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , to_tdate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as tdate_requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money, (select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money) as money_type_name ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) as loan_type_description ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , si_security_user , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) /*WHERE*/ )tab

r_ktm_loan_req_nest_old_loan.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' ) )
